wine_bars.name: Bar Cubeta
wine_bars.address: Carrer de la Font 16, 43730 Falset, Tarragona, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Sommelier-curated list of 80-plus Priorat and Montsant wines with rotating by-the-glass pours; known locally as the heart of Falset wine culture
wine_bars.description: Falset landmark wine bar cited by producers and visitors alike as the social hub for Priorat wine culture; deep regional list at cellar-door pricing.

wine_bars.name: Hostal Sport Wine Bar
wine_bars.address: Carrer Miquel Barcelo 6, 43730 Falset, Tarragona, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Hotel bar at the 1928 Hostal Sport with a full Priorat and Montsant wine list available by the glass; open to non-guests
wine_bars.description: The ground-floor bar of the historic 1928 Hostal Sport is Falset's meeting point for winemakers; broad Priorat list by the glass, open to all.

wine_bars.name: Cellers Cecilio Village Bar
wine_bars.wine_program: Historic Gratallops cellar bar pouring house Garnacha and Carinena by the glass in the original stone-vaulted village bodega
wine_bars.description: The Cecilio family cellar doubles as the village bar in Gratallops; an original-stone interior and pours from their own llicorella terraces.

wine_bars.name: L'Antic Forn de Pa
wine_bars.address: Carrer de Sant Roc 2, 43739 Porrera, Tarragona, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Converted village bakery in Porrera now serving DOQ Priorat by the glass alongside local charcuterie; strong Porrera-village producer focus
wine_bars.description: Former bakery in Porrera converted into a wine bar; village-producer pours and local cheese and charcuterie boards in a relaxed stone setting.

wine_bars.name: La Vinya del Senyor
wine_bars.address: Placa de l'Ajuntament 9, 43730 Falset, Tarragona, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Town-square wine bar open year-round with a mixed Priorat and Montsant list, popular during the Fira del Vi in May and harvest week in September
wine_bars.description: Main-square Falset wine bar with terrace seating; focal point for tastings during the annual Fira del Vi de Falset festival.

wine_bars.name: Tast de Priorat
wine_bars.wine_program: Village wine-tasting bar in Gratallops serving Garnacha and Carinena flights from local estates; focused on educating visitors about llicorella viticulture
wine_bars.description: Gratallops wine bar at the village centre designed as an entry point for visitors new to DOQ Priorat; guided flights explain llicorella soil and altitude.

wine_bars.name: Bar Restaurant Escaladei
wine_bars.address: Cami de la Cartoixa s/n, 43379 Escaladei, Tarragona, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Small bar-restaurant at the village of Escaladei serving local DOQ Priorat wines by the glass alongside simple Catalan dishes; popular with Scala Dei visitors
wine_bars.description: Bar at the hamlet of Escaladei adjacent to the Cartoixa ruins; a stopping point for wine tourists visiting Scala Dei with simple Catalan food pairings.

verified.address_quoted: Cami de la Cartoixa s/n, Escaladei

wine_bars.name: Vineria del Priorat
wine_bars.address: Carrer de la Mina 3, 43738 Bellmunt del Priorat, Tarragona, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Small wine bar in the mining village of Bellmunt; natural and minimal-intervention Priorat wines from small estates served alongside local charcuterie
wine_bars.description: Wine bar in the historic slate-mining village of Bellmunt del Priorat; specialises in natural and minimal-intervention wines from small regional estates.

verified.address_quoted: Carrer de la Mina 3, Bellmunt del Priorat

wine_bars.name: Bodega al Porter
wine_bars.wine_program: Village cellar bar in Porrera pouring estate Priorat and Porrera single-village wines; popular with hikers on the Porrera-Bellmunt llicorella trail
wine_bars.description: Informal cellar bar in Porrera catering to wine tourists and trail hikers; Porrera-village DOQ pours in an unpretentious stone setting.

wine_bars.name: Vi i Oli
wine_bars.address: Carrer de la Pedrera 5, 43730 Falset, Tarragona, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Wine and olive oil tasting bar in Falset pairing Priorat reds with Terra Alta olive oil; small by-the-glass list of local natural and organic estates
wine_bars.description: Falset tasting counter pairing Priorat wines with local olive oils; a dual-product experience rooted in Catalan food culture.

wine_bars.name: Etim Tasting Bar (Cooperativa Falset)
wine_bars.address: Avinguda de la Catalunya 2, 43730 Falset, Tarragona, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: In-cooperative tasting bar at the 1919 Martinell building; full Etim cooperative range by the glass including Garnacha, Carinena and Syrah from both DOQ Priorat and DO Montsant
wine_bars.description: The in-cooperative tasting bar at Falset's Martinell wine-cathedral; all Etim range labels by the glass in the original 1919 stone setting.

wine_bars.name: Celler del Pont
wine_bars.address: Carretera T-702 km 3, 43739 El Lloar, Tarragona, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Roadside winery bar in El Lloar serving own-label DOQ Priorat by the glass and bottle; walk-in welcome outside harvest season
wine_bars.description: Winery and informal tasting bar on the T-702 road near El Lloar; accessible to road-trippers exploring the Bellmunt-Porrera-El Lloar corridor.

wine_bars.name: Scala Dei Wine Bar
wine_bars.address: Rambla de la Cartoixa s/n, 43379 Escaladei, Tarragona, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Winery bar at Bodega Scala Dei pouring all estate DOQ Priorat labels by the glass; adjacent to the Cartoixa ruins
wine_bars.description: The on-site wine bar at Bodega Scala Dei serves all estate labels by the glass adjacent to the 12th-century monastery ruins; a key Priorat wine-tourism stop.

verified.address_quoted: Rambla de la Cartoixa s/n, 43379 Escaladei

wine_bars.name: Bar Restaurant La Llicorella
wine_bars.address: Avinguda Lluis Companys 12, 43730 Falset, Tarragona, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Local Falset bar named after Priorat's signature black slate soil; solid by-the-glass list of Priorat and Montsant alongside tapas and bocadillos
wine_bars.description: Everyday Falset bar and restaurant named for Priorat's llicorella bedrock; used by local producers and workers, with regional wine on tap.

wine_bars.name: La Botiga de la Fira
wine_bars.address: Carrer de la Bassa 1, 43730 Falset, Tarragona, Spain
wine_bars.wine_program: Wine shop and tasting counter in Falset stocking over 150 Priorat and Montsant bottles; by-the-glass pours open during the annual Fira del Vi and by appointment
wine_bars.description: Falset wine shop and tasting counter linked to the Fira del Vi; offers vertical tastings and is a key retail hub for both appellations.
